## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR (architectural cleanups and bug fixes don't ride together)
- [ ] `pytest -v` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] If this changes a public API or MCP tool surface: `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this adds a new family: it lives entirely under `python/chronohorn/families/<name>/`
- [ ] If this touches the runtime/kernel boundary: read `docs/REPO_BOUNDARY.md` first
